query:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?id ?main_label ?comment
WHERE {
  ?id rdfs:label ?main_label .
  FILTER(isIRI(?id))
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(LCASE(STR(?main_label)), "a"))
  OPTIONAL { ?id rdfs:comment ?comment }
  FILTER(STR(?id) > "http://data.doremus.org/52f5d3e3-4e5a-4f51-b767-3c293470b3be")
}
ORDER BY STR(?id) STR(?main_label) STR(?comment)
LIMIT 20

PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?id ?main_label ?comment
WHERE {
  ?id rdfs:label ?main_label .
  FILTER(isIRI(?id))
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(LCASE(STR(?main_label)), "a"))
  OPTIONAL { ?id rdfs:comment ?comment }
  FILTER(STR(?id) > "http://data.doremus.org/a1788f3b-ca51-444c-a207-53e61a836b1c")
}
ORDER BY STR(?id) STR(?main_label) STR(?comment)
LIMIT 20

PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?id ?main_label ?comment
WHERE {
  ?id rdfs:label ?main_label .
  FILTER(isIRI(?id))
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(LCASE(STR(?main_label)), "a"))
  OPTIONAL { ?id rdfs:comment ?comment }
  FILTER(STR(?id) > "http://data.doremus.org/artist/00170129-86e4-3fc1-a0ce-18f6be36097c")
}
ORDER BY STR(?id) STR(?main_label) STR(?comment)
LIMIT 20
